case_title: PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP vs. CATLETT, SHIRLEY A. et al

docket_entries.description: PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT CATLETT, SHIRLEY A.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT CATLETT, SHIRLEY A. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ORDER THAT SUMMONS BE SERVED BY POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATLETT, SHIRLEY A.
